name: Mexican Green Chili Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 can (4 oz) chopped green chilies, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a large nonstick skillet with cooking spray and place over medium-high heat until hot. Add chicken and onion, and cook until chicken is browned, stirring to crumble. Remove from heat.
2. Add cumin and the next three ingredients; stir well, and set aside.
3. Coat a 9-inch pie plate with cooking spray. Arrange the remaining tortilla halves, overlapping slightly, around the edge of the pie plate. Spoon the chicken mixture into the prepared crust, and sprinkle with cheese.
4. Combine milk and the next four ingredients in a container of an electric blender; cover and process until smooth. Pour over cheese.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes or until a knife inserted 1 inch from the center comes out clean. Let stand 10 minutes. Yield: 6 servings (serving size: 1 wedge). Calories: 217 (31% from fat); 7.4 g fat, 112 mg cholesterol and 311 mg sodium.
